articles.title: Only boys are caned in schools – but what does that teach our daughters?
articles.summary: 📰 싱가포르 최신 뉴스\n📢 Only boys are caned in schools – but what does that teach ou...
articles.content: Full disclosure: I’m Gen X. It was feared and sometimes, deserved. The cane’s effect was swift and painful. To me, the cane taught compliance. It stopped the “bad” behaviour immediately. It taught me that authority had the final word. “Sure, the caning stopped them that week,” she said
